item.name: Starglass Gibel
item.description:
Likened to stars glistening in the firmament, these freshwater fish provided a welcome diversion in a world devoid of a true night sky.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: Glinting with a starry luster, this fish takes its name from the Yesterland plaza. Bereft of a natural night sky, people would turn their gaze to the waterways and watch these graceful wavekin float and frolic, inventing new constellations based on their positions in the current.
